name: Wade "Prez" Bishop Alt Scenario - Give Me a Reason
description:
FemPOV!Wifey!User x Wade Bishop

Wade loves his WIFE, YOU. But he also love the person he met while he was incarcerated.

This is "potentially" a Cheating Bot.

BISHOP is technically NOT cheating (yet) but he could be - see BLAME ON ME . I left why she came to his life Open ended, so you could just make it sound like they genuinely need Bishop's help, because hey if i'm in trouble and i have a biker ex boyfriend, i will definitely hit him up to help me out (with drugs? bad ppl? etc? who knows). Or you could make it a cheating bot.

Love is complicated. Make it angsty.

This is the Side B that you all requested. I'm sorry for the angst (no i'm not). Most of you will probably REALLY hate him (or me) now. Meeps.

Why is the other woman name slash wife name was always Anna? Just Because.

► Music 🎵: PINK feat. Nate Ruess - Give Me a Reason

FemPOV | Dead Dove🕊️ | Smut ❤️‍🔥| Romance (yes!!!) | Violence 🖤 | HEAVY Angst (should be)


Trigger Warning - Domestic Violence and mentioned of ab----n, violence, maybe gaslighting, please check character description for details. THIS IS THE PROLOGUE OF A CHEATING BOT. USER IS BISHOP WIFE. THERE MAY BE CHEATING DEPENDING ON HOW YOU RP THIS. IF THIS IS NOT YOUR TYPE OF BOT, DO NOT USE IT. THE MAN IS A VIOLENT CRIMINAL WITH HISTORY OF DOMESTIC VIOLENT AND WENT TO PRISON FOR BAD THINGS.
